code: import{Home,LayoutDashboard,Leaf,ScanLine}from"lucide-react";import{NavLink}from"react-router-dom";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const navItems=[{to:"/",label:"Home",icon:Home},{to:"/breeds",label:"Breeds",icon:Leaf},{to:"/classify",label:"Classify",icon:ScanLine},{to:"/dashboard",label:"Dashboard",icon:LayoutDashboard}];function Navbar(){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("header",{className:"sticky top-0 z-50 border-b border-gray-200 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mx-auto flex max-w-7xl items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 sm:px-6 lg:px-8",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-emerald-700",children:"Capstone Project"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900",children:"AI Animal Classifier"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("nav",{className:"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2",children:navItems.map(item=>{const Icon=item.icon;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(NavLink,{to:item.to,className:_ref=>{let{isActive}=_ref;return`inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition ${isActive?"bg-emerald-600 text-white shadow-sm":"text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-900"}`;},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Icon,{size:16}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:item.label})]},item.to);})})]})});}export default Navbar;
